title: FreeDeepAgents activity manifest
description: Validates activities/<id>/manifest.json. Whitelist-only — any extra field will be rejected by tools/activity_verifier.py.

activity_type_id.description: Canonical FDA activity type/package id; must match the directory name under activities/

activity_id.description: Deprecated legacy alias for activity_type_id. New manifests should use activity_type_id.

name.description: Display name shown to users (Chinese OK)

skill_sources.description: Subdirectories under activities/<id>/ that DeepAgents loads as skills. "skills" loads all; otherwise list specific ones.

entrypoint.description: Always AGENTS.md (currently the only supported value)

input_modes.description: Subset of {text,file,image}. Activities that accept any kind of user input must include text.

capabilities.description: Optional capability gates. Recognized: image_generate / image_edit / tts_generate / read_document; anything else fails the verifier.

tools_module.description: Filename (no .py) of the activity's tools module under activities/<id>/. Must export `make_tools(ctx)` returning a list of LangChain @tool callables. Opts the activity into in-process Static Preview tools.

dsl_builder_module.description: Filename (no .py) of the activity's DSL builder module under activities/<id>/. Must export `build(instance_dir)` returning the DSL dict your activity's SPA consumes (shape is private to each activity). Required to activate the /preview/<activity_type_id>/<activity_id>/api/dsl.json endpoint. activities/<id>/site/ must also exist.

handlers_module.description: Filename (no .py) of the activity's handlers module under activities/<id>/. Exposes pure business functions; activity @tools wrap them and the SPA reaches them via POST /preview/<activity_type_id>/<activity_id>/api/<handler_name>. See memory-archive for the canonical example.

graph_model.description: Optional graph-specific model override (e.g. memory-archive uses qwen-plus for relation-graph extraction while keeping deepseek for chat). Same <provider>:<model_id> format as `model`.

sandbox_env.description: Environment variable NAMES this activity's sandbox needs (e.g. ["TMDB_API_KEY"]). The runtime injects only these names into this activity's sandbox, resolving VALUES server-side from secrets/<activity_id>.env or secrets/_shared.env — never from the activity source (secrets must not be synced) and never from arbitrary host env. Declare the need here; the admin sets the value out-of-band.

enabled.description: Catalog metadata for Go's activity-type sync (GET /v1/activity-types). Default true; set false to hide the activity from the catalog.

sort_order.description: Catalog metadata for Go's activity-type sync — display ordering. Default 0.
